ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json var id = vars.itemID --- { itemId: id, name: if (id == "1001") "Laptop" else if (id == "1002") "Mouse" else if (id == "1003") "Keyboard" else "Unknown item", quantity: if (id == "1001") 15 else if (id == "1002") 50 else if (id == "1003") 30 else 0, price: if (id == "1001") 1200 else if (id == "1002") 25 else if (id == "1003") 75 else 0 }
